nasb.text: Now when they heard this, they were cut to the quick, and they began gnashing their teeth at him.

esv.text: Now when they heard these things they were enraged, and they ground their teeth at him.

cnv.text: 眾人聽了這些話，心中非常惱怒，就向著司提反咬牙切齒。

ccb.text: 众人听了这番话，怒火中烧，咬牙切齿。

csbs.text: 他们听了这些话就勃然大怒，向司提反咬牙切齿。
